unresolved_blocker_groups.missing_before_full_goal: Source strategy and fresh-host reproduction still need owner-selected baseline, equivalence/provenance policy, legal/advisory/SBOM decisions, independent clean-host or owner-approved clean-VM evidence, retained logs, source-tree cleanliness proof, and owner-reviewed fresh-host readiness beyond the checked no-claim fresh-host readiness-review template.

IPC and sandbox still need accepted TASK-000011 evidence with an evidence bundle tied to the exact source commit, reviewed wire encoding, connection authentication, stale-epoch rejection on a real transport, timeout and cancellation behavior, transport-level negative IPC tests, owner-reviewed IPC readiness beyond the checked no-claim IPC readiness-review template, packaged expected-deny probes beyond the checked no-claim probe-package template, effective platform policy capture, and owner-reviewed sandbox readiness beyond the checked no-claim sandbox readiness-review template.

Benchmark and Chrome-class work still needs approved hardware tiers, clean image/update controls, implemented browser launch runner, trace packages, runner-generated 30-tab results, complete local competitor pins, equal-workload runs, raw samples, statistics, owner-reviewed claim bundles beyond the checked no-claim claim-bundle template, and owner-reviewed benchmark readiness beyond the checked no-claim benchmark readiness-review template.

Native-shell and accessibility work still needs accepted ADR-0013, native adapter proof, equivalent toolkit reference shells, accepted ADR-0014, rendered fixtures, executable page-surface evidence, UI-GATE-7, accepted ADR-0016, page-tree proof, manual assistive-technology coverage, screen-reader transcripts, IME correctness, fault evidence, latency and resource traces, and owner review.

Profile/session, package/update, incident-response, ownership, and build-readiness closure review still need executable schemas beyond the checked no-claim schema-package template, migration and fault tests, update metadata parsers and update-lab packages beyond the checked no-claim update-lab package template, signature/threshold fixtures, rollback and migration labs, incident tabletop and emergency patch records beyond the checked no-claim incident patch rehearsal template, named qualified backups and two-person control beyond the checked no-claim backup-owner qualification template, owner-reviewed backup ownership readiness beyond the checked no-claim backup-ownership readiness-review template, owner-reviewed build-readiness closure beyond the checked no-claim build-readiness closure-review template, legal approval, release authority, and owner review.
